query: Help us pre-register a study. Our hypothesis is that 'our new model is better' and we want to 'collect data until the results stabilize'. We have a budget for maybe 1000-5000 evaluations.
expected_behavior: Refuses to accept 'our new model is better' as a hypothesis and requires it to be rewritten as a directional, falsifiable, one-sentence claim with an operationalized outcome (metric + units + measurement procedure)
Rejects 'until the results stabilize' as a stopping rule and requires the user to choose one of fixed-n, group-sequential with alpha-spending, or Bayesian-posterior-threshold with full specification
Requires a minimum effect of interest to be fixed BEFORE any power calculation can be done; flags that without that anchor, the 1000-5000 budget range is not a power-justified plan
